shipRecommendationReason: Narrow local routine loader correctness fix. It restores intended fallback behavior for file-backed routines and does not justify a standalone release cut.

Added backend proof receipt showing listResult() and get() resolve omitted/blank slug routines by directory slug without skipped records.
